productName: Stingers - Stinger Sweets Vape - Guava Lava - 1g
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Guava Lava oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of ammonia, apple, and berry, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
